audit_result.proof_trace: BlobsByRange serves ALL blobs in requested range without checking fork epoch. After Fulu activation, it continues serving post-Fulu blobs instead of restricting to pre-Fulu (Deneb/Electra) blobs only, violating the fork transition invariant that blob_sidecars_by_range is deprecated post-Fulu.
audit_result.attack_scenario: Peer requests BlobsByRange for slots >= FULU_FORK_EPOCH. Node serves post-Fulu blobs via deprecated RPC method instead of rejecting or filtering, causing protocol confusion and potential consensus divergence with clients that correctly implement the fork transition.

PROP-6a4369e9-inv-029.text: During transition, blob_sidecars_by_range must serve only pre-Fulu epoch blobs.
PROP-6a4369e9-inv-029.assertion: forall sidecar in transition_resp: compute_epoch(sidecar.slot) < FULU_FORK_EPOCH
